texto: When you look at death, it makes you understand the importance of the moment when you have life and death in front of you, and you witness seeing someone deteriorating in front of you - it's an overwhelming experience. If you don't learn from that, I don't know what else you're gonna learn.
explicacao: Citação de Mickalene Thomas sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “When you look at death, it makes you understand the importance of the moment when you have life a…” articula sabedoria, vida, experience em registro de sabedoria, com relevância para contextos como luto e experience.

frase_original: When you look at death, it makes you understand the importance of the moment when you have life and death in front of you, and you witness seeing someone deteriorating in front of you - it's an overwhelming experience. If you don't learn from that, I don't know what else you're gonna learn.
